key_events_next_24h.name: FOMC Rate Decision (Powell Final Meeting, Day 2)
key_events_next_24h.note: Rate hold 3.50-3.75% near-certain (CME FedWatch 100%). Pre-event uncertainty causing BTC selloff today (-1.6%). Powell tone at presser is key risk.

key_events_next_24h.name: Fed Chair Powell Press Conference
key_events_next_24h.note: Powell's likely final meeting adds uncertainty on forward guidance. Hawkish tone risk elevated given oil at $104+.

key_events_next_24h.name: Spot BTC ETF Daily Flow Report
key_events_next_24h.note: BlackRock IBIT leading inflows ~$246M/day recently. 9+ consecutive days positive. Institutional demand provides BTC floor.

key_events_next_24h.name: US-Iran Peace Talks / Hormuz Watch
key_events_next_24h.note: Hormuz still restricted, Brent crude above $104. No resolution imminent. Inflation risk dampens Fed dovish pivot expectations.

notes: FOMC 금리 동결 예상, 파월 마지막 회의. BTC $76K 하락 중

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$76,500 as of Apr 28 16:09 UTC. Opened at $77,368 today, fell -1.6% from Monday open ($78,661). Range today: $76,290-$77,368. $80K resistance intact; support ~$75,000 (100-day MA).
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 47 (Neutral) — recovered from 33 (Fear) yesterday and 29 last week
BTC down -1.6% today ahead of FOMC meeting (Apr 28-29)
Technical indicators: 19 bearish vs 9 bullish signals (short-term bias bearish)
Strategy (MicroStrategy) bought $2.54B BTC (34,164 BTC) — largest buy in 17 months
BlackRock IBIT: ~$246M inflows on Apr 22; 9+ consecutive days positive ETF flows
KelpDAO exploit: $292M stolen, $14B DeFi TVL exodus — altcoins hit harder than BTC
Brent crude >$104/barrel — elevated inflation concern for Fed
FOMC Apr 28-29: rate hold 3.50-3.75% near-certain; Powell press conference is key risk
No CPI/PPI releases in next 24h (CPI Apr release: May 12; PPI Apr release: May 13)
analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC Day 1 Apr 28 (now), decision Apr 29 at 18:00 UTC. Rate hold near-certain but pre-event uncertainty pushing BTC lower today. Powell press conference (18:30 UTC Apr 29) is the key catalyst — tone on forward guidance and transition to new chair adds uncertainty. Oil at $104+ reduces likelihood of dovish signal. ETF inflows remain positive structural support.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.45): FOMC pre-event volatility, -1.6% BTC decline today, 19 vs 9 bearish technical indicators, and elevated oil prices all lean bearish short-term. Offset by Strategy $2.54B purchase, 9+ days of ETF inflows, and F&G recovering from Fear to Neutral. Confidence below 0.50 threshold — macro filter INACTIVE. Mixed signals do not support a directional trade.
